# Stack Variant: Web Full-Stack — Bun.js + Vanilla JS SPA + SQLite
# Generated by claude-project-scaffolder from VaultLister 2.0 reference on 2026-03-02
# To regenerate: "scaffold vaultlister-3" — WARNING: overwrites this file and all scaffold files.

# CLAUDE.md – VaultLister 3.0

## Core Mission
Zero-cost, offline-capable multi-channel reselling platform for listing to 9+ marketplaces, managing inventory, and automating reseller workflows with AI-powered tools.

## Design Reference
All design artifacts live in `./design/`. Before any architectural decision, read the relevant design file. The design is the source of truth — code serves the design.

| File | Contains |
|------|---------|
| `design/INDEX.md` | Canonical entity names — always use exact terms, never synonyms |
| `design/00-Executive-Summary.md` | Value proposition, personas, kill switches, north star |
| `design/03-Feature-Specs.md` | Feature specs and acceptance criteria |
| `design/05-Data-Model-and-Flows.md` | Entities, relationships, data flows |
| `design/08-Technical-Architecture.md` | ADRs and system decisions |

**Run `/design-sync` at the start of any session where design context may be stale.**

## Architecture
- **Stack:** Bun.js 1.3+ + Vanilla JS SPA (route-based chunking) + SQLite 3 (WAL mode, FTS5) + Playwright + @anthropic-ai/sdk
- **Auth:** JWT (15-min access + 7-day refresh) + bcryptjs (12 rounds) + TOTP MFA + OAuth 2.0 (eBay, Etsy, Shopify, Poshmark, Mercari)
- **Database:** SQLite 3 (WAL mode, FTS5 full-text search, better-sqlite3)
- **Real-time:** WebSocket (built into Bun HTTP server)
- **Deploy target:** Docker + Nginx (self-hosted) + GitHub Actions CI/CD

Key decisions:
- Bun.js runtime (not Node.js) — faster startup, built-in WebSocket/HTTP, native SQLite (ADR-001)
- Vanilla JS SPA (no framework) — zero bundle overhead, route-based chunk loading (ADR-002)
- SQLite over PostgreSQL — local-first, WAL mode for concurrency, FTS5 for inventory search (ADR-003)
- Playwright for marketplace automations — headless browser bots for Poshmark sharing, offer management (ADR-004)
- @anthropic-ai/sdk (Claude) for AI features — listing generation, image analysis, price suggestions, Vault Buddy chat (ADR-005)

## Naming Conventions
- **Entity names:** Use exact canonical names — InventoryItem, Listing, Sale, Offer, Automation, Platform, PriceHistory, ImageAsset, Analytics, Report, User, Session, Notification, Tag, AuditLog
- **API routes:** `/api/[resource-name]` (kebab-case)
- **Frontend chunks:** Lazy-loaded by route (e.g., `pages/inventory.js`, `pages/analytics.js`)
- **Files:** kebab-case (e.g., `inventory-routes.js`, `offer-service.js`)

## Session Workflow

```
1. bun scripts/session-start.js     # Check pending items, read STATUS.md
2. Work on pending items             # Update STATUS.md immediately after each fix
3. bun scripts/session-end.js       # Safety net for missed updates
4. bun scripts/transfer-approved.js # After user approves items
```

## Specialized Agents

8 agents in `.claude/agents/` — each has strict scope boundaries:

| Agent | Use For | Never For |
|-------|---------|-----------|
| **Architect-Planner** | Architecture, folder structure, tech stack, design reviews | Writing code |
| **Backend** | Routes, middleware, database, auth, API endpoints | Frontend, AI, testing |
| **Frontend-UI** | Vanilla JS, UI components, responsiveness, accessibility | Backend, database |
| **Automations-AI** | Anthropic SDK, Playwright bots, external APIs, AI features | Routes, frontend |
| **Security-Auth** | Auth flows, JWT, rate-limiting, OWASP, secret management | Business logic, UI |
| **Testing** | Bun:test, Playwright E2E, visual tests, coverage | Application code |
| **DevOps-Deployment** | Docker, CI/CD, .env, backups, scaling, logging | Application code |
| **NoCode-Workflow** | n8n, webhooks, JSON exports, external triggers | JavaScript code |

## Key Commands

| Task | Command |
|------|---------|
| Start server | `bun run dev` |
| Start server (background) | `bun run dev:bg` |
| Run all tests | `bun run test:all` |
| Run unit tests | `bun run test:unit` |
| Run E2E tests | `bun run test:e2e` |
| Run visual tests | `node scripts/visual-test.js` |
| Reset database | `bun run db:reset` |
| Syntax check | `bun run lint` |
| Script help | `bun scripts/help.js` |

## Critical Rules

1. **Run `session-start.js` at the start of every session**
2. **Never create one-off/batch scripts** — use permanent scripts or `bun -e "..."`
3. **Update STATUS.md immediately** after each fix — never batch updates
4. **Never mark items complete** without real testing
5. **Update `memory/MEMORY.md` after every commit** — mark relevant open issues as ✅ fixed with commit hash
6. **Always escape HTML** for user content (`escapeHtml()`)
7. **Use TEXT for all ID columns** (UUIDs, not INTEGER)
8. **Include CSRF token** for POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE requests
9. **Notion page IDs are in `.env`** — never hardcode them in scripts

## Bot Safety Rules (MANDATORY for automated agents)

### Files You Must NEVER Modify Without Running Tests
1. **`src/frontend/app.js`** — Contains `store.persist()`, `store.hydrate()`, `api.request()`, and the entire SPA state management. Any change to auth-related methods MUST be followed by `bun test src/tests/auth.test.js`.
2. **`src/backend/middleware/securityHeaders.js`** — Contains CSP configuration. Changes MUST be followed by `bun test src/tests/security.test.js`. NEVER remove `'unsafe-inline'` from `script-src` or `style-src`.
3. **`.env`** — NEVER modify. PORT, secrets, and database config are set by the user.

### Auth Infrastructure — Do Not Touch Without Understanding
The following functions in `app.js` form the auth persistence chain. Removing any piece breaks "Remember Me":
- `store.persist()` — MUST persist `token` and `refreshToken` to storage
- `store.hydrate()` — MUST restore `token` and `refreshToken` from storage
- `store.setState()` — calls `persist()` automatically
- `api.request()` — reads `store.state.token` for Authorization header
- `api.refreshAccessToken()` — reads `store.state.refreshToken`

### Before Every Commit
1. Run `bun test src/tests/auth.test.js src/tests/security.test.js` (under 30 seconds)
2. If you modified any backend route, run the relevant test file
3. Never use `git add -A` — add specific files you changed
4. The pre-commit hook enforces these rules automatically

### Things You Must NEVER Do
- Remove `token` or `refreshToken` from `store.persist()` or `store.hydrate()`
- Remove `'unsafe-inline'` from CSP `script-src` or `style-src`
- Change PORT in `.env` or modify `.env` in any way
- Make "progress checkpoint" commits without running tests first
- Use `git add -A` (add specific files by name instead)
- Use `--no-verify` to bypass git hooks
- Modify `.husky/pre-commit`, `.husky/pre-push`, or `.husky/commit-msg`

## Automation Safety Rules (Playwright Bots)
- NEVER run automations against a live marketplace without explicit user confirmation
- Always validate bot credentials from `.env` before starting any automation session
- Respect rate limits — minimum delay between actions per platform spec
- Log all automation actions to `data/automation-audit.log`
- Stop automation and alert immediately on any CAPTCHA or bot detection

## Autonomous Mode Rules
- Always check file existence before Write — never overwrite unknown files
- Never commit `.env`, secrets, or credentials
- Git commits: `[AUTO]` prefix + conventional commit style (`feat`, `fix`, `chore`, `docs`, `test`, `refactor`)
- Never push directly to `main` — push to feature branches
- Run `/compact` at 70% context usage; `/clear` at 85%
- Use Explore subagent for codebase exploration > 5K LOC
- Use debugger subagent for error diagnosis — do not retry failed commands more than twice
- Log all sessions in `audit-log.md` (append-only)

## Code Conventions
- Prefer existing patterns in the codebase over introducing new abstractions
- No error handling unless explicitly requested or at system boundaries (user input, external APIs)
- No docstrings, comments, or type annotations on code you did not change
- Delete unused code completely — no commented-out stubs
- Only add comments where the logic is not self-evident
- Minimal changes: fix what is asked, do not refactor surrounding code

## Session Management
- At session start: read `memory/STATUS.md` for pending tasks
- At session end (or at milestones): run `/status` to update STATUS.md
- Use subagents (Explore, debugger) to protect main context for long sessions
- For cross-session task continuity: rely on memory/STATUS.md + audit-log.md

## Agent Handoff Protocol

### On Session Start
1. Read `memory/STATUS.md` — check "Pending Review", "In Progress", "Messages", and "Last Completed Work"
2. Review every entry in "Pending Review" — run `git show <hash> --stat` and `git show <hash>` to inspect commits
3. Check "Messages" for notes left by previous sessions — act on them, then clear
4. Run `git log --oneline -5` — see what was committed since your last session
5. If no user instruction, check "Next Tasks" and claim the highest-priority unclaimed task

### During Work
1. Update `memory/STATUS.md` → "In Progress" with what you're doing and which files you're editing
2. Commit frequently with descriptive messages (Conventional Commits format)

### On Session End
1. Move entry from "In Progress" to "Last Completed Work" in `memory/STATUS.md`
2. Update "Current State" with any changes
3. Add follow-up tasks to "Next Tasks"

## MVP Features (V1.0)
Inventory management, cross-listing to 9 platforms (Poshmark, eBay, Mercari, Depop, Grailed, Etsy, Shopify, Facebook Marketplace, Whatnot), Playwright automations (closet sharing, follow-back, offer rules), offer management, sales tracking, analytics dashboard, AI listing generation via Claude, image bank with AI tagging, AR previews, blockchain verification, Chrome extension.

---

## Post-Scaffold Setup (Human Steps Required)

These items require manual action before the first Claude Code session.

- [ ] Clone or copy codebase from VaultLister 2.0 into this directory
- [ ] Configure git remote: `git remote set-url origin https://github.com/Vaultifacts/VaultLister-3.0.git`
- [ ] Create `.env` file — copy `.env.example` and fill in all required values (see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [ ] Install dependencies: `bun install`
- [ ] Initialize database: `bun run db:init`
- [ ] Test server startup: `bun run dev` — confirm port 3000
- [ ] Set `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` in `.env` for AI listing generation and Vault Buddy
- [ ] Configure marketplace API credentials in `.env` (eBay OAuth, Etsy API, Poshmark, Mercari)
- [ ] Install Playwright browsers: `bunx playwright install`
- [ ] Set `GITHUB_TOKEN` in `.env` (used by .mcp.json GitHub MCP server)
- [ ] Implement hook stubs in `.claude/hooks/` — each stub has behavior spec in comments
- [ ] Review `.claude/settings.json` deny rules — tighten or relax as needed
- [ ] Test a Claude Code session to confirm hooks run without error before a full autonomous session
